do_not_merge.reason: Contradicting strong identity field entity_type: first record is 'advisory committee', second is 'agency'. Per Identity Merge Canon Contradiction test, if any strong identity field differs (entity_type), the records are distinct regardless of name similarity.

suggestion.rationale: The two records share the same display name and acronym (PCAC), but their entity_type fields differ: one is an 'advisory committee' (the actual PCAC entity, as evidenced by meeting documents), the other is 'agency' (erroneously or differently scoped). The Canon's contradiction test (rule 1) applies first and forces do_not_merge. No further analysis needed.
